title: ForgedAPI Fork
description: Partial re-implement of the Fabric API on Forge forked to fix critical bugs and add more Fabric API modules
body:
# ForgedAPI (fork)
This mod is a partial re-implementation of FabricAPI in Forge. It is the same idea as ForgedFabricAPI, but ForgedFabricAPI implements very sparse functionality, so I have ported FabricAPI to reduce the workload at the mod port level.

This is a fork of [ForgedAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgedapi) by PortingLab

**This mod doesn't allow the Fabric mod to run on Forge!**
## Parts already implemented
* Fabric API Base
* Fabric Events Lifecycle
* Fabric Renderer API & Indigo
* Fabric Rendering
* Fabric Models
* Fabric Block Render Layers
